item.text: I’ll run one fresh, read-only check covering inventory, JSON shape/types/values/order, owner supersession, document phrase/size, forbidden fields, and date/timestamp exclusions. I’ll preserve the command output verbatim in the response and create no evidence file.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A'
catalog=\""'$root/catalog.json"
handoff="$root/docs/handoff.md"

actual_files=$(find "$root" -type f -print | sort)
expected_files=$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$catalog" "$handoff" | sort)
test "$actual_files" = "$expected_files"
printf '"'PASS inventory\\n%s\\n' \""'$actual_files"

jq -e '"'
  (keys | sort) == [\"items\",\"owner\",\"schema_version\"] and
  (.schema_version | type) == \"number\" and .schema_version == 1 and
  (.owner | type) == \"string\" and .owner == \"release\" and
  (.items | type) == \"array\" and (.items | length) == 2 and
  [.items[].name] == [\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and
  all(.items[]; ((keys | sort) == [\"enabled\",\"name\"]) and (.name | type) == \"string\" and (.enabled | type) == \"boolean\" and .enabled == true) and
  ([.. | objects | has(\"notes\")] | any | not)
' \""'$catalog"
echo '"'PASS catalog contract'

handoff_words="'$(wc -w < "$handoff" | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$handoff_words" -le 50
printf '"'PASS handoff compact: %s words\\n' \""'$handoff_words"
rg -n -F '"'source of truth' \""'$handoff"
echo '"'PASS required phrase'

if rg -n -i -F 'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; else echo '"'PASS abandoned owner absent'; fi

if rg -n -i '("'^|[''^[:alnum:]_])(timestamp|datestamp)([''^[:alnum:]_]|$)|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{2,4}|[0-9]{1,2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2})?|January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December'"' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; else echo '"'PASS no timestamps or datestamps'; fi

test "'! -e "$root/incoming/catalog-seed.json"
echo '"'PASS no substitute seed file'"

item.aggregated_output:
PASS inventory
longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json
longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md
true
PASS catalog contract
PASS handoff compact: 36 words
3:Operators should treat `catalog.json` as the source of truth for catalog ownership, item order, and enabled state. Process items from top to bottom and update the catalog directly when an item's state changes.
PASS required phrase
PASS abandoned owner absent
PASS no timestamps or datestamps
PASS no substitute seed file
